title: Freshly Fragrant Syrian Dates Tagine
description: A classic Syrian dish featuring pitted dates, grilled to perfection and infused with aromatic spices.
instructions: Combine dates, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and sumac in a bowl.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute.
Add dates and spices to the skillet, stir to combine.
Grill the tagine over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
Transfer the tagine to a serving dish and garnish with fresh parsley.
Serve warm, accompanied by steamed rice or flatbread.
Optional: add a dollop of yogurt or sprinkle with sumac for added flavor.
Let the tagine rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
